URLS.COMMENT_URLS: All URLs prepended with SITE_CORE_URL value

PRODUCT_CATALOG.COMMENT_ORIGINAL_CATALOG_1: Source feed that is altered to generate daily feed
PRODUCT_CATALOG.COMMENT_ORIGINAL_CATALOG_PATH: pacifichome V2 catalog, symbolically linked to common

COMMENT_PRODUCT_QUERIES: Some pids should not be included in generating traffic
COMMENT_CATEGORY_QUERIES: Category queries are generated internally using product feed
COMMENT_CATEGORY_EXCLUDES: Exclude these categoryIds to generate searchCategory ids
COMMENT_LOW_PERF_CATS_1: Categories for which visitor exits their session more often than not
COMMENT_LOW_PERF_CATS_2: thus causing analytics data that shows it is low-perf category
COMMENT_SEGMENTATION: Use either RTS or RBS style (if any), not both
COMMENT_VISITOR_1: (Optional) Define special visitor ID for which past-purchase data is automatically generated
COMMENT_VISITOR_2: Visit days are days on which this visitor actually visits the site
